other_findings.finding: Epidermal Tc cells upregulate RGS1, PPP1R15A (skin tissue residency), CD44, ID2 (effector memory), TNFRSF18 (T cell activation), CD96, TSC22D3, DUSP4 (T cell inhibition)
Disease-associated subsets: Tc IL13/IL22 dominant in AD dermis; Tc17/Th17 dominant in psoriasis epidermis
Disease-associated T cells show higher clonality and lowest diversity compared to other T cell subsets
Clonal T cells show higher expression of CD63, TNFRSF18, JAML (co-stimulation) and EVL, LAT, LCK, JAK1 (TCR signaling)

evidence_quotes.source_file: Reynolds et al. (2021) PDF full text

evidence_quotes.quote: cytotoxic T cells expressing IL13, IL22 and IFNG (Tc IL13/IL22)
evidence_quotes.source_file: Reynolds et al. (2021) PDF full text

evidence_quotes.quote: T cells expressing IL17A, IL17F, IFNG, IL22 and IL26 (Tc17/Th17) are found in both lesional and non-lesional skin
evidence_quotes.source_file: Reynolds et al. (2021) PDF full text
